infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Yaanam shares your bus location with parents and the school while a trip is live.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Yaanam keeps sharing the bus location during a live trip even when the app is in the background, so parents can track the bus.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Yaanam shares your bus location with parents and the school while a trip is live.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Yaanam keeps sharing the bus location during a live trip even when the app is in the background, so parents can track the bus.

plugins.cameraPermission: Yaanam uses the camera to take a boarding photo when you mark a student present.
